How to Use
1. Double tap your headphones to pause/play music while you listen to it.

product.shortDescription: There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.
product.description:
Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds Headset Headphones Compatible with iPhone and Samsung


About this item


  • 2025 Bluetooth 5.3 Technology : The wireless earbuds use the bluetooth 5.3 chipset. There is a faster and more stable signal transmission and has successfully achieved low latency without interruption. With a range of up to 10 m, whether you are at home, in the office, or on the road, you don't have to worry about disconnection of the bluetooth earbuds. Automatic pairing & compatible with multiple devices.
  • More Outstanding Noise Reduction : The wireless headphones adopts dual 14.2mm low-distortion composite dynamic drivers with high resolution decoder built-in and AAC&SBC audio coding technology. In addition, the calling noise cancellation technology brings a clearer sound to your calls, giving you a whole better feeling, everything from the noise cancelling earbuds.
  • LED Power Display : The LED display on the charging case shows you the charge level of the case as well as the wireless earphones, so you can precisely control the charge level of your headphones wireless for your convenience on the go. Simply tap on the earbuds wireless bluetooth to skip songs, play/pause music, answer/hang up phone calls, activate voice assistant, all without taking out your phone.
  • 36 Hours and Faster Charging: The bluetooth earphones offer up to 2-4 hours of usage on a single charge, with the charging case supporting up to 30 hours of usage, ensuring all-day usage. The wireless bluetooth headphones feature a Type-C charging port, providing a more stable and secure charging method, and significantly extending the battery life of the noise cancelling headphones.
  • Ergonomic IP5 Waterproof Design : With ultra-light Nano coating, the headphones with mic reach IP5 waterproof grade, dust and rain proof, the extreme lightness, the in-ear design in line with the shape of human ears, and the softer silicone ear cap, make you feel comfortable in any scene and can only hear your own music, all from this true wireless ear buds.

Very good sound and stable Bluetooth 5.3 connection. ANC is decent for gym noise. Wish the case was a bit smaller.
Comfortable ear-hooks and fast Type-C charging. Music time seemed closer to the spec for me, though the listing had mixed battery claims.
Sound is clear but the microphone struggles in windy conditions. Good for music, not perfect for outdoor calls.
Battery degraded faster than expected after a few months and charging case stopped holding full charge reliably.
Pairing was flaky on two different phones. Couldn’t keep a stable connection during runs, had to return.
Used these while kayaking and they didn’t leak. Very impressed by the waterproofing and overall build.
They fit fine but the ear-hook is a bit bulky for long wear. Sound OK for the price.
Good value. Type-C charging is fast, and the case display is handy to check battery levels.
Perfect for gym sessions — secure, loud enough, and the Bluetooth never dropped. Highly recommend for sports.
ANC is basic but helps with background noise. Comfortable and good call quality indoors.
Left bud stopped working after about a month. Customer service was slow but issued a partial refund.

Reviews.comment: Excellent sound and battery life. The auto play/pause works flawlessly and the earbuds fit securely for workouts.
Great value — Bluetooth 5.0 is stable and noise cancellation is decent for the price. Charging case is compact.
Very comfortable ear-hooks and IPX waterproofing handled my run in light rain. Volume controls on each bud are handy.
Mostly happy but had occasional dropouts in crowded areas. Mics are fine for calls though.
Battery life on the earbuds was shorter than advertised for me. The case charges fine but earbuds died within a day of heavy use.
One earbud stopped connecting after two weeks. Customer support was slow to respond. Sound quality was okay before it failed.
Noise cancellation reduces ambient noise well. Touch controls are responsive and voice assistant works reliably.
Solid build and replaceable ear tips are a plus. USB-C charging is fast. Would like slightly better bass.
Comfort is fine but the ear-hook design is bulkier than I expected. Good for sports but not discreet.
Impressed by the overall package — waterproof, stereo sound and long play time. Perfect for daily commuting.
Clear calls even in busy places. Pairing was instant and stable. Very happy with purchase.
Good features but build quality feels a bit cheap. After a month one hinge on the foldable case became loose.

Reviews.comment: Excellent sound and snug fit. Battery life lasted me through a full workday. Waterproofing worked fine during a run in light rain.
Great value for the price. Bluetooth connection is stable and noise cancelling helps on commutes. Case could feel a bit more premium.
Very comfortable and clear calls. Sometimes the touch controls are overly sensitive, but overall impressed.
Sound quality is good for podcasts, but bass is lacking for heavier music. Waterproofing is a plus.
Bluetooth version listed as 5.3 in the title but packaging says 5.0. Works fine mostly, just a little confusing.
Fit didn't work for me; buds fell out during workouts. Sound OK but not great for the price.
Stopped working after a month. Customer support was slow to respond. Very disappointed.
Fantastic for calls — my colleagues said I sounded clear. Pairing is instant and battery case recharges quickly.
Lightweight and colorful options are great. Noise cancelling is decent for the price point.
Mids are muffled at high volume. Seals were uncomfortable until I swapped tips. Warranty handled okay.
Love the yellow pair I bought. So comfy and the controls are intuitive. Battery life exceeds my expectations.
Good battery and connectivity. Would rate higher if ANC were stronger, but still a solid daily driver.

Reviews.comment: Excellent sound and the noise cancelling works surprisingly well for the price. Comfortable ear-hook design stays put during runs.
Great Bluetooth 5.0 connection and battery life is decent. Mic quality is clear on calls.
Good value. Waterproof rating saved me during a sweaty gym session. Fit was a little tight at first.
Sound is good but bass could be stronger. Noise cancellation is adequate for commuting.
Pairing was flaky on an older phone. After firmware reconnects improved but setup was frustrating.
One earbud stopped holding charge after a month. Customer support response was slow.
Very lightweight and foldable as advertised. Call quality is clear even in noisy environments.
Controls are a bit unintuitive but once learned they work. Overall decent for workouts.
Battery lasts through most of my day. Charging cable included which is handy.
Comfort wasn't great for long wear — the ear-hook rubbed after a couple of hours.
Impressed by the HD voice and clear microphone. Perfect for remote meetings.
Solid purchase. Design and performance beat other budget earbuds I've tried.
